docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,348.46 FILED BY DRAGALIN, MATT AS TO DEFENDANT BEE AUTO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-18-2013 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-09-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-09-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY HELENA NONG--PRESIDENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DRAGALIN, MATT IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BEE AUTO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF -SIGNED SERVED OCT-25-2013, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BEE AUTO
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF DRAGALIN, MATT AS TO DEFENDANT BEE AUTO
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF DRAGALIN, MATT
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF -SIGNED SERVED AUG-13-2013, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BEE AUTO
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF DRAGALIN, MATT AS TO DEFENDANT BEE AUTO

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-18-2013 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO DEC-09-2013 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. DEFECTIVE PROOF OF SERVICE, PLAINTIFF MUST RE-SERVE THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO THE NEXT HEARING. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT BEE AUTO
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-09-2013 - JUDGMENT.
